model.name: LTX-2 2.3 MSR Ref Distilled 1.1 22B
model.description: LTX-2.3 distilled 1.1 checkpoint (22B) configured for the LiconStudio Multiple Subject Reference LoRA. Provide 2 to 5 reference images; background first, then subjects and objects.

prompt: A cinematic tracking shot of the referenced subjects standing together in the referenced environment, natural motion, detailed clothing, consistent identities, realistic lighting.
